completed_steps.summary: Classified as monolith with 1 part: web (React 19.2.4 PWA + TS 5.9.3 + Vite 7.3.1 + Supabase 2.97.0 + Zustand 5.0.11 + Tailwind 4.1.17 + Zod 4.3.6)
Found 99 existing doc files in docs/, 176+ source files in src/, 80+ test files in tests/, 21 SQL migrations, 18 CI workflows, CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md
Tech stack: React 19.2.4, TS 5.9.3, Vite 7.3.1, Zustand 5.0.11, Supabase 2.97.0, Tailwind 4.1.17, Framer Motion 12.34.3, Zod 4.3.6, Sentry 10.39.0, Vitest 4.0.17, Playwright 1.58.2

4 parallel agents completed exhaustive scan: Agent A (project-overview 9 files + architecture 7 files + source-tree 7 files = 3,698 lines, 7 full rewrites), Agent B (api-reference 16 files + data-models 11 files = 4,392 lines, 2 new docs created), Agent C (component-inventory 9 files + state-management 9 files = 2,709 lines, all from complete source analysis), Agent D (development-guide 15 files + performance 2 files = 2,898 lines, corrected secrets/coverage/build)
Master index.md updated: corrected file count 99, line count ~15,900, added 2 new API reference docs (13-scripture-reading-service, 14-additional-services), updated date to 2026-03-07
Validation: No '(To be generated)' markers found. No TBD/TODO/Pending placeholder markers found. All grep hits are legitimate code references (syncPendingMoods, isPending, etc.)

Finalized. 99 markdown files, ~15,900 lines across 9 sections + performance + root. Key corrections: Supabase 2.93.3->2.97.0, Framer Motion 12.29.3->12.34.3, dotenvx/Doppler->fnox/age, coverage 80%->25%, Epic 4 Done, removed phantom files, added scripture-reading-service and additional-services docs.
